verbToRouteShape.notes: Summary, risk focus, and links to operational pages.
Source connection and health belongs here, not inside a run detail page.
Use when user must choose source, template, scope, and execution mode.
Event list with status, owner, SLA, and retry actions.
Explain one run/event and link to issues and reports.
Bulk status and assignment actions, but no row-level diff repair.
Owns fix strategy, before/after diff, confirmation, and rollback note.
Report list, export status, and compliance readiness.
Read-only report preview with evidence and export actions.
Immutable history, actor, object, before/after, and reason.

splitTriggers.trigger: A page contains more than two primary verbs from connect/configure/run/repair/report/audit.
splitTriggers.action: Split into lifecycle routes before writing UI.

splitTriggers.trigger: A PRD mentions diff, rollback, confirmation, or manual override.
splitTriggers.action: Create a dedicated repair/review detail route.

splitTriggers.trigger: A PRD mentions templates, standards, rules, or policy versions.
splitTriggers.action: Create policy/library routes separate from execution routes.

splitTriggers.trigger: A PRD mentions logs, traceability, compliance evidence, or responsibility.
